moments.author: Elon Musk
moments.quote: He takes scamming to a whole new level
moments.why: Musk reignited the viral feud with Sam Altman amid Apple’s lawsuit, branding him ‘Scam Altman’—the barbs are dominating tech chatter.

moments.author: Sam Altman
moments.quote: Homeboy, you’re the one pitching space datacenters to public investors
moments.why: Altman fired back sharply, mocking Musk’s space‑centric pitch and turning the feud into memes — trending in AI and finance circles.

moments.author: Sam Altman
moments.quote: Scam Altman is super good at scamming.
moments.why: Musk revived his longstanding nickname for Altman and sparked a new wave of controversy — coverage spread fast across outlets.

moments.author: Elon Musk
moments.quote: They really put a lot of effort into committing this crime.
moments.why: Referencing Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI, Musk escalated the controversy—his posts are fueling business‑tech debate.
